title.beginner: Keep my photos safe and private
title.developer: Deploy Immich — ML photo stack with Postgres/Redis

goals.reward: All your phone photos, saved on your own cloud — private, and yours forever.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Immich"
Download the Immich app on your phone and log in
Turn on Auto Backup — done, your photos are safe
intermediate: Install Immich from the App Store
Connect via the mobile app using your nsl.sh URL
Enable auto backup and configure album sync
developer: Install Immich (uses Postgres + Redis + ML microservices)

title.beginner: Watch my movies and shows from anywhere
title.developer: Deploy Jellyfin — media server with hardware transcoding

goals.reward: Your own streaming service — your movies, shows, and music, anywhere.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Jellyfin"
Upload your movies using the File Manager
Open Jellyfin and start watching
intermediate: Install Jellyfin and add media libraries
Organize files in /DATA/Media/Movies/ and /DATA/Media/TV/
Install Jellyfin or Swiftfin on your phone/TV
developer: Hardware transcoding via VA-API if available

title.beginner: Store my files in my own cloud
title.developer: Access /DATA via File Manager or SSH

goals.reward: Your own Google Drive — drag, drop, and access your files from any device.

beginner: Open the File Manager from your dashboard
Drag and drop files to upload them
Click any file to download or share it
intermediate: Open File Manager, navigate to /DATA/
Upload via drag & drop, use sslip.io URL for large files
Share files with public links
developer: File Manager at /DATA/, SSH for direct access
Large uploads via sslip.io (no size limit)

goals.reward: Your own Minecraft server — invite friends, no monthly fees.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Crafty"
Create a new Minecraft server inside Crafty
Share your server address with friends and play
intermediate: Install Crafty from the App Store
Create server, configure whitelist and difficulty
Port 25565 is auto-forwarded, share your nsl.sh address
developer: Crafty manages multiple MC server instances
Web panel for config, console, and backups

title.developer: Deploy Suwayomi with Byparr for Cloudflare bypass

goals.reward: Read manga from 1,200+ sources — no ads, no tracking, no limits.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Suwayomi"
Open Suwayomi and add manga sources you like
Search for manga and start reading
intermediate: Install Suwayomi, enable extensions by language
Add to library for chapter tracking
Downloads stored in /DATA/Media/Mangas/
developer: Suwayomi with Byparr sidecar for CF-protected sources

title.beginner: Write notes and organize my ideas
title.intermediate: Self-host a wiki and knowledge base
title.developer: Deploy Docmost — collaborative wiki with API

goals.reward: Your own Notion — write notes, build wikis, keep everything organized and private.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Docmost"
Create your first page and start writing
Organize pages into spaces by topic
intermediate: Install Docmost, create workspace
Use /commands for blocks, Ctrl+K for search
Invite members via Settings > Members
developer: Export pages as Markdown or HTML

title.developer: Deploy Odoo — modular ERP with 30+ apps

goals.reward: CRM, invoicing, inventory — everything your business needs, on your own server.

beginner: Open the App Store and install "Odoo"
Create a database with your company name
Install the apps you need (CRM, Invoicing, etc.)
intermediate: Install Odoo, create database with admin credentials
Install modules: CRM, Invoicing, Project, Inventory
Add users via Settings > Users & Companies
developer: proxy_mode = True pre-configured for reverse proxy
